intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is in a state of severe degradation. The expected registry (P1-P4) is largely absent or non-viable. Only the P3 anchor (White Rabbit) remains visible in the black pot.

inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter in the black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Partial Presence: White Rabbit anchor remains; Pothos foliage is absent or collapsed beyond detection.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No visible plant matter.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface; no signs of Mexican Mint.
plant_audit.P3: White Rabbit anchor present. Pothos specimen is not visible, suggesting total senescence or burial.
plant_audit.P4: Empty soil surface; no signs of Silver Guest.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears dark and potentially desiccated, though lighting makes precise moisture assessment difficult.
biome_observations.debris: White crystalline/fragmented debris visible in P3, likely remnants of previous potting or structural support.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t1: Rapid loss of visible green biomass. The single sprout noted in the earliest image has vanished.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: Static state of total loss. No recovery or new growth observed.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-functional. The absence of chlorophyll-bearing tissue indicates that all specimens are either dead or have undergone complete postural collapse into the substrate.
vision_report.anomalies: The primary anomaly is the total disappearance of the expected botanical specimens, leaving only the inanimate anchor (White Rabbit).
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic failure of the indoor biome. Starting from the earliest image, which showed a single, fragile sprout, the subsequent timeline shows a complete cessation of visible plant life. The environment is now effectively a collection of empty pots containing only soil and the white rabbit anchor. No signs of life, fungal activity, or recovery are present.
